name: Khamenei's Compound — Pasteur District, Tehran
detail: 30 bombs by Israeli jets at ~08:10 IRST. Khamenei + family killed. 48 leaders eliminated.

name: Thar-Allah HQ — Tehran
detail: IRGC command center for Tehran security. IDF released video of strike.

name: Revolutionary Court — Shariati St, Tehran
detail: Building completely destroyed.

name: IRIB Broadcasting HQ — Alvand St, Tehran
detail: State TV interrupted. Broadcasts hacked to air Trump and Netanyahu speeches.

name: Armed Forces General Staff — Sepah Square
detail: Extensive bombing of military command infrastructure.

name: Shajareh Tayyebeh School — Minab
detail: 148–180 children killed (contested). School was ~200ft from IRGC Navy base.

name: Natanz Nuclear Facility
detail: Ground-penetrating munitions. Already damaged in June 2025.

name: Fordow Underground Facility
detail: Access roads and entrance hit. Deep damage uncertain per IAEA.

name: Niloofar Square — Tehran
detail: 20 civilians killed on March 2.

name: Interior Ministry — Tehran
detail: Coordinated IRGC/Basij operations hub.

name: IRGC Navy HQ — Bandar Abbas
detail: Port facilities and fast-attack craft destroyed. Hormuz Strait patrol boats sunk.

name: Parchin Military Complex
detail: Suspected weapons research site. B-2 bunker busters deployed. IAEA denied access pre-strike.

name: Tabriz Air Base
detail: IRIAF fighter jets destroyed on tarmac. Runway cratered.

name: Missile Storage — Khorramabad
detail: Underground ballistic missile depot. Secondary explosions lasted 4 hours.

name: Chabahar Port Facilities
detail: Drone and missile assembly warehouse targeted. India condemns strike near joint project.

name: Isfahan University of Technology
detail: Alleged drone R&D lab. 12 civilians killed. Iran calls it war crime.

name: Azadi Sports Complex — Tehran
detail: 12,000-seat indoor arena destroyed by U.S.-Israeli airstrike.

name: Supreme National Security Council HQ — Tehran
detail: Building destroyed; several senior officials killed.

name: Expediency Discernment Council — Tehran
detail: Facility targeted and destroyed.

name: Bushehr Airport
detail: Terminal damaged; Iran Air Airbus A319 destroyed.

name: Min Zadai Underground Facility
detail: Suspected nuclear weapons site destroyed.

name: Tehran and Kermanshah Strikes
detail: Israeli airstrikes targeted Tehran and Kermanshah, disabling much of Iran’s air defenses and missile infrastructure.

name: Beirut Strikes
detail: Israeli airstrikes targeted southern suburbs of Beirut following a mass evacuation order.

name: Iranian Drone Carrier Strike
detail: U.S. forces struck the Iranian drone carrier IRIS Shahid Bagheri at sea.

name: Tehran Air Defense Systems
detail: Israeli airstrikes targeted and significantly damaged Iran's air defense and missile infrastructure in Tehran.

name: Beirut's Southern Suburbs
detail: Israeli airstrikes hit Hezbollah-held areas in Beirut following a mass evacuation order.

name: Iranian Drone Carrier
detail: U.S. forces struck and destroyed an Iranian drone carrier at sea.

name: Iranian Missile Facilities
detail: U.S. B-2 bombers destroyed deeply buried missile launch facilities and other key military sites in Iran.

name: Iranian Naval Vessels
detail: U.S. Navy submarine sank an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean off the coast of Sri Lanka.
